_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Acquire and maintain a working knowledge of constitutional issues relevant laws, regulations, policies, agreements, standards, procedures, or other issuances.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to translate complex regulatory requirements into clear, actionable organizational policies and operational procedures that non-legal staff can implement and verify.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.499), SP-K-004 (SP, cosine: 0.498).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.402). Shared vocabulary: [policies, procedures]. DCWF-only terms [acquire, agreements, constitutional, issuances, issues, knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, actionable, clear, complex, implement, legal] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.850 (P=0.851, R=0.850). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Acquire and maintain a working knowledge of constitutional issues relevant laws," and "Ability to translate complex regulatory requirements into clear, actionable orga" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.512 > STS 0.402 (gap +0.111). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [policies, procedures] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.1%. Shared tokens: [policies, procedures]. DCWF-only: [acquire, agreements, constitutional, issuances, issues, knowledge]. WIDAI-only: [ability, actionable, clear, complex, implement, legal].
